title: Glazed Tiles
description: A 32px pack that turns glazed terracotta into grouted tiles, while still keeping similar colours and patterns.
body:
![Glazed Tiles: A display of all sixteen glazed terracotta blocks, in order of black, blue, brown, cyan, gray, green, light blue, light gray, lime, magenta, orange, pink, purple, red, white and yellow.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HRynQXuS/images/b3210def6d602aafe0290539321c3840c81f2f1f.png)
Tired of large patterned walls, that can be difficult to work into a project?
Or are you just looking for something a bit more modern you can fit in to multiple different projects?

Whatever the case, try out Glazed Tiles! A 32px alternative to glazed terracotta.


![A corner view of a pool setting using BSL Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HRynQXuS/images/3dce2a61e9ae1050c4b2b8bbdf3502355d6728a8.png)
Displayed with BSL Shaders
